description_long: This is a thick, hardcover book with a dark, matte cover featuring a large, colorful '25' graphic composed of photographic images in blue, green, and red hues. The cover also displays several blocks of text and logos, with the main design elements centered and prominent. The book appears to be a product catalogue, as suggested by the layout and visual emphasis on the anniversary number. The edges of the pages are visible, showing a dense, tightly bound volume. The spine is solid and wide, with text and logos oriented horizontally. The overall appearance is professional and modern, suitable for display or reference in an urban environment such as an office, showroom, or public library.
description: A thick, hardcover book with a dark cover and a large, colorful '25' graphic, featuring professional design elements and logos. The book is dense and visually striking, likely a product catalogue.
description_view_0: The front cover is visible, showcasing the large '25' graphic, colorful imagery, and multiple logos and text blocks.
description_view_1: The book is seen from above, emphasizing the flat, dark cover and the full expanse of the '25' graphic, with the spine and page edges less visible.
description_view_2: The opposite edge of the book is shown, with the front cover and the '25' graphic still visible, but the spine is now on the left side.
description_view_3: The spine is most prominent, displaying horizontal text and logos, with the front and back covers only partially visible.
attribute_cover_illustration: The main cover features a large, stylized '25' filled with photographic images in blue, green, and red tones, arranged in a collage style. The imagery within the numbers appears to depict various products or scenes, giving a celebratory and professional look. The rest of the cover is dark and minimalistic, with no additional illustration beyond the graphic elements.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is dark gray with horizontal text and logos in white, red, and orange. The design is clean and professional, with the text oriented for easy reading when the book is laid flat.
attribute_publisher_logo: A circular orange and white logo with the word 'lucido' is visible on the lower right of the front cover and also on the spine.
